div.p: Inputs: rows_a, rows_b, dist_a, dist_b Complexity: O(1) Assumptions:

ol.li: Uniform distribution of values (no heavy skew)
Inclusion Principle (values in smaller domain exist in larger domain) Logic: python def estimate(na, nb, da, db): max_d = max(da, db) if max_d == 0: return 0 return ceil((na * nb) / max_d)

text.tspan: when one set of values is a
Each cell represents a cluster of matches
Area of colored blocks = total result set size
